prompt: A photograph of a tech keynote presentation. A bald man with glasses, wearing a dark blue sweater and jeans, stands on a stage to the left, smiling and pointing with both index fingers at a large presentation screen behind him. The screen displays a slide with a light blue background. At the top left is a small teal pill-shaped badge reading "NEW DATA". Below it, the main headline reads "Microsoft Edge is the #1 browser to download Google Chrome", with "#1" highlighted in blue. A subheadline reads "% of Google Chrome downloads that started from another browser". Below this is a bar chart with three bars. The first bar is tall and blue, labeled "38.6%" above it, with the Microsoft Edge logo and text "Microsoft Edge" below it. The second bar is shorter and gray, labeled "17.2%" above it, with the Mozilla Firefox logo and text "Mozilla Firefox" below it. The third bar is the shortest and gray, labeled "13.0%" above it, with the Apple Safari logo and text "Apple Safari" below it. At the bottom left of the slide, small text reads "Source: Microsoft internal analysis of Google Chrome download referrals Cohort: Windows 10 and 11, Worldwide, Jan - March 2024". To the left of the screen, a wooden panel features the Microsoft logo (four colored squares). The backs of audience members' heads are visible in the foreground at the bottom.
